home.heroP: An internationally acclaimed university preparing students for leadership in a connected, ever-changing world.
home.aboutP1: Modess Business School has been shaping tomorrow's leaders for decades. Our diverse international community fosters intellectual curiosity, cultural understanding, and professional excellence.
home.aboutP2: With world-renowned faculty, cutting-edge research facilities, and an unmatched global network, we equip students with everything they need to thrive.
home.quote: “Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.”
home.why1Desc: Connect with 60,000+ alumni across 60 countries and build lasting professional relationships.
home.why2Desc: Learn from world-renowned professors and industry practitioners with decades of experience.
home.why3Desc: Dedicated career services, internship placements, and a 94% graduate employment rate.
home.why4Desc: Access cutting-edge research facilities and collaborate on projects with global impact.
home.ctaP: Join thousands of students who chose excellence.

about.heroP: Founded on the principles of excellence and global citizenship, Global University has been a beacon of higher education for over five decades.
about.missionP1: Our mission is to provide a transformative educational experience that equips students with the knowledge, skills, and character to lead with purpose in a complex world.
about.missionP2: We foster an environment where intellectual curiosity thrives, diverse perspectives are celebrated, and every student is empowered to reach their full potential.
about.value1Desc: We uphold the highest standards of scholarship and critical thinking in everything we do.
about.value2Desc: Our diverse community reflects the world we prepare students for — inclusive and forward-thinking.
about.value3Desc: We embrace new ideas, methods, and technologies to keep education at the frontier.
about.value4Desc: Honesty, ethics, and responsibility are the cornerstones of our institutional character.
about.ctaP: Admissions are open for the upcoming academic year.

programs.heroP: From undergraduate foundations to postgraduate specialisations, our programs are designed to launch careers and transform ambitions.
programs.bachelorsHeroP: Begin your academic journey with a rigorous undergraduate degree that builds the foundations of a successful international career.
programs.mastersHeroP: Elevate your expertise with a postgraduate qualification designed to fast-track your career to senior leadership and global impact.
programs.ctaH2: Not Sure Which Program Fits You?
programs.ctaP: Our admissions team is here to guide you.
programs.bachelorsCtaP: Admissions are open. Secure your place today.
programs.mastersCtaP: Our admissions team will help you choose the right program.

bba.title: Bachelor of Business Administration
bba.desc: A comprehensive program covering management, finance, marketing, and entrepreneurship for the global marketplace.

dm.title: BSc Digital Marketing
dm.desc: Master modern marketing strategies including SEO, social media, data analytics, and digital campaign management.

bth.title: Bachelor of Tourism & Hospitality
bth.desc: An industry-integrated degree covering tourism strategy, event management, and global hospitality operations.

bhm.title: Bachelor in Hotel Management
bhm.desc: Develop the operational and leadership skills needed to manage world-class hotels, resorts, and hospitality enterprises.

mba.title: Master of Business Administration
mba.desc: Our flagship MBA develops visionary business leaders with advanced strategic, financial, and leadership capabilities.

mib.title: Master in International Business
mib.desc: Navigate complex global markets with expertise in cross-cultural management, international trade, and strategy.

scm.title: MSc Supply Chain Management
scm.desc: Build mastery in end-to-end supply chain strategy, procurement optimisation, logistics, and operations management.

mim.title: Master in International Management
mim.desc: Develop advanced management competencies with emphasis on multinational organisations and global leadership.

mth.title: Master of Tourism & Hospitality Management
mth.desc: An advanced degree for hospitality professionals seeking senior leadership positions in global tourism industries.

contact.heroP: Whether you have questions about admissions, programs, or campus life — our team is ready to guide you.
contact.formSubtitle: Have a question or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about yourself and how we can help...
contact.successP: Our admissions team will be in touch shortly.
